title: Golden Gingered Brazilian Chicken Toast
description: A peppery and snappy Brazilian dish featuring golden caster sugar, toast, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, perfect for a light lunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the golden caster sugar, grated ginger, black pepper, and salt.
Place the chicken breast in a shallow dish and brush the sugar and ginger mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken.
Drizzle the olive oil over the chicken and let it marinate for 10 minutes.
Place the chicken on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20 minutes or until cooked through.
While the chicken is cooking, toast the whole wheat bread until lightly browned.
Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it thinly.
Assemble the toast by spreading a slice of toasted bread with a slice of chicken, a sprinkle of chopped cilantro, and a drizzle of any remaining marinade.
